## Sales and production of milk

```{r}
#| label: milk production and sales table

milk_prod_sales_df <- create_df_for_table(
  data_path = params$dir_data,
  analysis_df_name = "milk_prod_df",
  interview_meta_df = supervisor_interviewer_interview
)

tbls50x30::anim_prod_sales(
  livestock_df = milk_prod_sales_df,
  cases = cases_for_report,
  anim_id_var = monitor50x30:::extract_id_var_names(params_df$milk_prod_animal_id_var),
  anim_vals = monitor50x30:::extract_var_values(params_df$milk_prod_animal_vals[[1]]),
  produced_var = monitor50x30:::extract_var_names(params_df$milk_prod_produced_var),
  produced_val = monitor50x30:::extract_var_values(params_df$milk_prod_produced_val),
  sold_var = monitor50x30:::extract_var_names(params_df$milk_prod_sold_var),
  sold_val = monitor50x30:::extract_var_values(params_df$milk_prod_sold_val),
  amt_sold_vars = monitor50x30:::extract_var_names(params_df$milk_prod_amt_sold_vars[[1]]),
  amt_sold_dk_val = monitor50x30:::extract_var_values(params_df$milk_prod_amt_sold_dk_val),
  group_var = "supervisor",
  table_title = "Milk, production and sales",
  anim_type_label = "Milk-producing animals"
)
```
